welcomeMessage: Hello! I am ready to help with whatever you are building.
systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Give clear, accurate, and practical responses. Ask clarifying questions when a request is ambiguous, and adapt your tone to the user and product experience.
fallbackMessage: I cannot process that request in this starter app. Please rephrase your message or customize the keyword interceptor in Backend/src/config/ai-config.json.
